node.statement: EXPECTATION BOUND |omega(q_a)| <= C eta ||a||^2. omega(q_a)=omega(P(a^2))-omega(a^2). Write omega(P(a^2))=omega(Phi(a^2)) + omega((P-Phi)(a^2)). By GT-Pprops delta=||P-Phi||<=C eta; omega is a state so |omega(y)|<=||y|| (GT-state-bounded); ||a^2||=||a||^2 (GT-bh-cstar). So |omega((P-Phi)(a^2))| <= ||(P-Phi)(a^2)|| <= delta||a^2|| <= C eta||a||^2. Also omega(Phi(a^2))=(omega o Phi)(a^2)=omega(a^2)+((omega o Phi)-omega)(a^2), and |((omega o Phi)-omega)(a^2)| <= ||omega o Phi - omega||*||a^2|| <= eta||a||^2 (GT-hyp). Hence omega(P(a^2))=omega(a^2)+r with |r|<=C eta||a||^2, so |omega(q_a)|=|r|<=C eta||a||^2.
